title: La Tuca
summary:
La Tuca was a ski resort in Betrén, a village in the municipality of Vielha e Mijaran, in the Aran Valley, Spain. It was open from 1972 to 1989. 
As of 2009, there were plans for it to be reopened in 2011.


== Notes ==
